import type { SerovalNode } from 'seroval'; import { createPlugin } from 'seroval'; const URLPlugin = /* @__PURE__ */ createPlugin<URL, { value: SerovalNode }>({ tag: 'seroval-plugins/web/URL', test(value) { if (typeof URL === 'undefined') { return false; } return value instanceof URL; }, parse: { sync(value, ctx) { return { value: ctx.parse(value.href), }; }, async async(value, ctx) { return { value: await ctx.parse(value.href), }; }, stream(value, ctx) { return { value: ctx.parse(value.href), }; }, }, serialize(node, ctx) { return 'new URL(' + ctx.serialize(node.value) + ')'; }, deserialize(node, ctx) { return new URL(ctx.deserialize(node.value) as string); }, }); export default URLPlugin;
